facts.statement: The treated condition separates from control over time, with a larger mean normalized signal visible by the 4- and 6-hour measurements.
At 6 hours, the treated condition has a higher endpoint response than control, and the replicate-level points show the effect is not driven by a single sample.

design_notes: Direct labels are preferred over a detached legend for panel a because there are only two series.
Panel b should retain replicate-level points so the summary bars do not hide within-group spread.
This figure should export to editable PDF and SVG with journal-safe font sizes.
